formulas.name: Nominal GDP
formulas.variables: GDP: Gross Domestic Product, p₀: Price of the year 0, q₀: Quantity of the year 0
formulas.notes: Nominal GDP is calculated at the current prices of the year.

formulas.name: Real GDP
formulas.variables: GDP: Gross Domestic Product, P₁: Price of the year 1, P₀: Price of the year 0
formulas.notes: Real GDP is calculated at the prices of the base year (usually year 0).

formulas.name: GDP Deflator
formulas.variables: Nominal GDP: Gross Domestic Product at current prices, Real GDP: Gross Domestic Product at constant prices
formulas.notes: GDP Deflator measures the price changes over a period of time.

formulas.name: National Income at Factor Cost
formulas.variables: NIFC: National Income at Factor Cost, Wages and Salaries: Compensation paid to factors of production
formulas.notes: National Income at Factor Cost includes all factor incomes.

formulas.name: National Income at Market Price
formulas.variables: NIMP: National Income at Market Price, NIFC: National Income at Factor Cost
formulas.notes: National Income at Market Price includes taxes and subsidies.

formulas.name: Saving (S)
formulas.variables: S: Saving, Y: National Income, C: Consumption
formulas.notes: Saving is the difference between National Income and Consumption.

formulas.name: Investment (I)
formulas.variables: I: Investment, Y: National Income, C: Consumption, S: Saving
formulas.notes: Investment is the difference between National Income, Consumption, and Saving.
